'''ngatocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whatcheeriid|whatcheeriid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whatcheeriid|whatcheeriid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngatocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngætecheth|ngætecheth]] || [[word:ngætechej|ngætechej]] || [[word:ngætechesh|ngætechesh]] || [[word:ngæteche|ngæteche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngatotochoth|ngatotochoth]] || [[word:ngatotochoj|ngatotochoj]] || [[word:ngatotochosh|ngatotochosh]] || [[word:ngatotocho|ngatotocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngatochoth|ngatochoth]] || [[word:ngatochoj|ngatochoj]] || [[word:ngatochosh|ngatochosh]] || [[word:ngatocho|ngatocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngatofchoth|ngatofchoth]] || [[word:ngatofchoj|ngatofchoj]] || [[word:ngatofchosh|ngatofchosh]] || [[word:ngatofchof|ngatofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngatochotho|ngatochotho]] || [[word:ngatochojo|ngatochojo]] || [[word:ngatochosho|ngatochosho]] || [[word:ngatochoko|ngatochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngatochoth|ngatochoth]] || [[word:ngatochoj|ngatochoj]] || [[word:ngatochosh|ngatochosh]] || [[word:ngatocho|ngatocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngatochothol|ngatochothol]] || [[word:ngatochojol|ngatochojol]] || [[word:ngatochoshol|ngatochoshol]] || [[word:ngatochokol|ngatochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngatochothotho|ngatochothotho]] || [[word:ngatochojojo|ngatochojojo]] || [[word:ngatochoshosho|ngatochoshosho]] || [[word:ngatochoko|ngatochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngatochothon|ngatochothon]] || [[word:ngatochojon|ngatochojon]] || [[word:ngatochoshon|ngatochoshon]] || [[word:ngatochokon|ngatochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngatochothoro|ngatochothoro]] || [[word:ngatochojoro|ngatochojoro]] || [[word:ngatochoshoro|ngatochoshoro]] || [[word:ngatochokoro|ngatochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
